compiled_state.title: RED tests: 8 new library ops — tag, untag, comment, edit, create, link, list, transition
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE (modifying existing test-ticket-lib-api.sh to add test functions for 8 new ops)

## File to Modify
tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh (already exists from Story B)

## Test Functions to Add (Given/When/Then)
For each of 8 ops, add one test function:
- test_ticket_tag_via_library: Given a ticket, When ticket tag <id> <tag> called, Then ticket show output includes the tag in tags array
- test_ticket_untag_via_library: Given a tagged ticket, When ticket untag <id> <tag> called, Then tag no longer in tags array
- test_ticket_comment_via_library: Given a ticket, When ticket comment <id> "body" called, Then ticket show output includes comment with correct body
- test_ticket_edit_via_library: Given a ticket, When ticket edit <id> --title "new" called, Then ticket show shows updated title
- test_ticket_create_via_library: Given a repo, When ticket create task "title" called, Then ticket show returns valid ticket JSON with correct title and type
- test_ticket_link_via_library: Given two tickets, When ticket link <id1> <id2> depends_on called, Then ticket deps shows dependency
- test_ticket_list_via_library: Given tickets in repo, When ticket list called, Then output is valid JSON array containing the tickets
- test_ticket_transition_via_library: Given an open ticket, When ticket transition <id> open in_progress called, Then ticket show status = in_progress

All tests must FAIL (RED) before implementation because ticket-lib-api.sh does not yet define the new functions.
Tests use PATH shim (prepend dir with sentinel wrapper that records invocations) to verify no exec to respective .sh scripts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 8 new test functions added to tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -c "^test_ticket_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh | awk "{exit (\$1 >= 8) ? 0 : 1}"
- [ ] All 8 tests fail RED before implementation (ticket_tag, ticket_untag, etc. not yet in library)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|not.*found"
- [ ] .test-index entries map all new source files to this test file
  Verify: grep "ticket-lib-api.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes after full implementation (GREEN gate after all impl tasks)

comments.body: AC amendment (gap-1): Add epic-close child-state gate tests: (a) epic with open children → ticket transition epic closed must fail with non-zero exit; (b) same epic after closing all children → succeeds. This guards against ticket_transition sub-agent missing the precondition check.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment (gap-2): Add concurrency test: launch N>=5 background ticket_tag/ticket_comment calls against same ticket, assert every event landed in commit log, no corrupted JSON lines, no lost updates. Tests write_commit_event flock contract under pure-bash library path.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment (gap-4): Add runtime DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 assertions per op (not just grep). With DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 set, assert that the original .sh script is actually executed (via PATH shim tracing), not just that the env-var branch exists in source.
comments.author: Test
